read_posts.implementation_decision: Allowed only through owned-account Threads API access.

read_owned_insights.implementation_decision: Fail closed unless app review, permissions, and eligible account are documented.

search_public_content.implementation_decision: Do not implement browser scraping as a fallback.

rate_limit_policy.decision: Adapter must centralize retry/backoff and surface rate-limit failures as bounded errors.
rate_limit_policy.evidence: Policy matrix marks API operations as gated by official API access; exact limits must be rechecked during adapter implementation.

data_retention_policy.decision: Store normalized tracker fields and bounded platform metadata only.
data_retention_policy.evidence: No raw private logs, credentials, cookies, or full API responses are required for the example review.

disallowed_fallbacks: No scraping fallback for capabilities marked not_publicly_available.
No synthetic owned insights when the platform does not expose them.
No raw token or cookie capture in logs or review evidence.

credentialed_smoke.evidence: Example review intentionally contains no credentials or account-specific proof.
